subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-10-17 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: The essence of the Torah was the Ancient Covenant, and that Ancient Covenant was but an allusion to this New Covenant, which is the Covenant of the manifestation of the Lord's revelation in all His attributes and perfection [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اصل تورات عهد قدیم  است و آن عهد قدیم اشاره بود از این عهد جدید که عهد ظهور تجلی رب است به جمیع صفات و کمال
subcodes.subjects: @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @prophecy and fulfillment, @spiritualization of humanity in the future; a new race of men, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion
